articles.author: Sheikh Saaliq
articles.title: Modi’s party takes control of India’s West Bengal in key state election - AP News
articles.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s ruling party has taken control of West Bengal, an opposition stronghold, in a key local election. The Election Commission of India released partial results showing the Bharatiya Janata Party securing wins in at least tktk…
articles.content:
NEW DELHI (AP) Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modis ruling Hindu nationalist party on Monday wrested control of the state of West Bengal, an opposition stronghold, in a key election.
